subject: AsiaPower — your enquiry about BYD473QE
body:
Dear Francis,

I hope this message finds you well. I noticed your recent enquiry about the BYD473QE engine through our website, and I wanted to follow up to see how we can assist you further.

We can check available supply from our verified China-based supplier network for this model. To better assist you, could you please share if you need the engine with specific accessories included, such as the gearbox, alternator, or starter?

Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards,  
Zijing Lu  
AsiaPower Sales Team  
www.asia-power.com

subject: AsiaPower — your enquiry about 2AZ-FE
body:

subject: AsiaPower — your enquiry about 1ZR-FE
body:

AsiaPower Sales Team

subject: AsiaPower — following up on your enquiry
body:
Dear Dennis,

I hope this message finds you well. I noticed your recent interest via our website in sourcing machinery and related equipment for Ghana, but we haven’t received further details from you yet.

We can assist in checking available supply from our verified China-based supplier network tailored to your needs. To better support you, could you please share what types of equipment or specific models you are interested in? Also, knowing your preferred destination port in Ghana (such as Tema or Takoradi) would help us provide more accurate information.

Looking forward to your reply and the opportunity to assist your sourcing needs.

Best regards,  
AsiaPower / Zijing
